title: Video: Dutch rescue team arrives in Venezuela as earthquake death toll reaches 920
title_zh: 视频：荷兰救援队抵达委内瑞拉，地震死亡人数升至920人
description: A Dutch Urban Search and Rescue (USAR) team arrived in Venezuela early Saturday morning to assist in the aftermath of this week’s devastating earthquakes.
description_zh: 一支荷兰城市搜救队（USAR）于周六清晨抵达委内瑞拉，协助应对本周毁灭性地震的灾后重建工作。

title: Energy companies shift to customer-friendly debt collection to help clients pay bills
title_zh: 能源公司转向以客户为中心的债务催收方式，以帮助客户支付账单。
description: Energy suppliers in the Netherlands are increasingly adopting “social collection” methods to recover unpaid bills, a shift that includes earlier personal contact, fewer penalties, and more payment
description_zh: 荷兰的能源供应商正越来越多地采用“社会催收”方式来追讨未付账单，这种转变包括更早地与客户进行个人联系、减少罚款并提高付款率。

title: Nationwide Rijkswaterstaat outage disrupts bridges, tunnels, and traffic systems
title_zh: 全国范围内的 Rijkswaterstaat 停电中断了桥梁、隧道和交通系统
description: An ongoing nationwide outage at Dutch infrastructure agency Rijkswaterstaat is disrupting the operation of bridges, locks, and tunnels across the Netherlands.
description_zh: 荷兰基础设施机构Rijkswaterstaat目前正面临全国范围内的系统故障，导致荷兰各地的桥梁、船闸和隧道无法正常运行。

title: Pingpong-sized hail strikes Dutch coastal area, lightning damages homes and cars
title_zh: 乒乓球大小的冰雹袭击荷兰沿海地区，闪电损坏房屋和汽车。
description: Hailstones as large as pingpong balls have already caused damage in Koudekerke and nearby Dishoek just after midday Saturday.
description_zh: 周六中午刚过，库德克尔克和附近的迪舒克就遭受了乒乓球大小的冰雹袭击，造成了破坏。

title: Tram derails in The Hague after collision with DHL truck; no injuries reported
title_zh: 海牙一辆有轨电车与DHL货车相撞后脱轨；无人受伤
description: A tram derailed in the Ypenburg district of The Hague early Saturday at about 4:43 a.m. after colliding with a DHL delivery truck at an intersection near Delft, authorities said.
description_zh: 当局称，周六凌晨 4 点 43 分左右，海牙伊彭堡区一辆有轨电车在代尔夫特附近的一个十字路口与一辆 DHL 送货卡车相撞后脱轨。

title: Dutch farmers denounce sweeping nitrogen emissions cuts
title_zh: 荷兰农民谴责大幅削减氮排放的政策
description: Dutch farmers' groups on Friday denounced the government's sweepingnitrogen reduction p
description_zh: 荷兰农民团体周五谴责政府全面削减氮肥的政策。

title: Severe thunderstorm warning upgraded in Netherlands; Tornado risk not ruled out
title_zh: 荷兰强雷暴预警升级；不排除出现龙卷风的风险
description: Around midday Saturday, the Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI) upgraded its warning for severe thunderstorms to Code Orange from the less intense
description_zh: 周六中午前后，荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）将强雷暴预警级别从较低级别的“强”升级为“橙色”。

title: 1-year-old boy left alone at Schiedam daycare after staff miss closing check
title_zh: 一名1岁男童被独自留在斯希丹托儿所，原因是工作人员疏忽了关门检查。
description: A 1-year-old boy was left alone at a daycare center in Schiedam on Thursday evening after staff failed to notice the child at closing time, Rijnmond
description_zh: 周四晚间，斯希丹一家日托中心关门时，一名1岁男童被独自留在中心，工作人员未能注意到他。莱茵蒙德

title: Three injured, two seriously, in Almere; stabbing; Three arrested
title_zh: 阿尔梅勒发生持刀伤人事件，三人受伤，其中两人伤势严重；三人被捕。
description: Three people were injured, including two seriously, in a stabbing late Friday afternoon on Louis Armstrongweg in Almere.
description_zh: 周五下午晚些时候，在阿尔梅勒的路易斯·阿姆斯特朗路发生一起持刀伤人事件，造成三人受伤，其中两人伤势严重。

title: Woman gives birth on N44 highway in Wassenaar amid extreme heat
title_zh: 一名女子在瓦瑟纳尔的N44高速公路上，顶着酷暑分娩。
description: A woman gave birth to a son Friday along the N44 highway in Wassenaar after going into labor inside a car during extreme
description_zh: 周五，一名女子在瓦瑟纳尔的N44高速公路旁，于极端高温天气下于车内临盆，并顺利诞下一子。

title: Video: 24-year-old man dies after drowning in Waal near Tiel
title_zh: 视频：一名24岁男子在蒂尔附近的瓦尔河溺水身亡
description: A 24-year-old man died after drowning in the Waal near Tiel on Friday evening, de Gelderlander
description_zh: 据《海尔德兰人报》报道，周五晚间，一名24岁男子在蒂尔附近的瓦尔河溺水身亡。

title: Dutch government pushes EU ban on plastic-based chewing gum amid litter crisis
title_zh: 荷兰政府推动欧盟禁止塑料口香糖，以应对垃圾危机
description: The Dutch government is urging the European Union to ban the sale of chewing gum containing plastic.
description_zh: 荷兰政府敦促欧盟禁止销售含有塑料的口香糖。

title: Netherlands records first regional super heatwave since 2020 as Ell hits 30.4 °C
title_zh: 荷兰遭遇自2020年以来的首个区域性超级热浪，气温高达30.4摄氏度。

title: 52% of Dutch chief financial officers are less optimistic about the economic outlook
title_zh: 52%的荷兰首席财务官对经济前景持较为悲观的态度。
description: Chief financial officers in the Netherlands are still focused on growth but are taking a more cautious stance as economic and geopolitical uncertainty intensifies, according to a new survey by Delo
description_zh: 德勤（Delo）最新调查显示，荷兰首席财务官们仍然关注经济增长，但随着经济和地缘政治不确定性的加剧，他们的态度也更加谨慎。

title: Warning over falling STI checks as gonorrhoea and syphilis cases grow
title_zh: 淋病和梅毒病例增加，性传播感染检测数量下降，需引起警惕
description: The annual report of the Rijksinstituut voor Volksgezondheid en Milieu (RIVM) shows that nearly 147,000 consultations took place at municipal health service (GGD) centres in 2025, an 8% decrease co
description_zh: Rijksinstituut voor Volksgezondheid en Milieu (RIVM) 的年度报告显示，2025 年，市卫生服务 (GGD) 中心进行了近 147,000 次咨询，比 2025 年减少了 8%。

title: One-third of workers expect AI to make their jobs mentally harder
title_zh: 三分之一的员工预计人工智能会增加他们工作的脑力负担。
description: A new Netherlands Organisation for Applied Scientific Research (TNO) study shows that most workers in the Netherlands expect artificial intelligence to leave their jobs largely unchanged.
description_zh: 荷兰应用科学研究组织 (TNO) 的一项新研究表明，荷兰的大多数劳动者认为人工智能不会对他们的工作造成太大影响。

title: Terschelling sets Wadden Islands heat record with 33.6°C; Events canceled in Rotterdam
title_zh: 特斯海灵岛气温高达33.6摄氏度，创下瓦登群岛最高气温纪录；鹿特丹多项活动取消
description: The temperature on Terschelling hit 33.6 degrees Celsius on Friday, marking the highest temperature ever recorded on one of the Wadden Islands, according to the Royal Netherlands Meteorological Ins
description_zh: 据荷兰皇家气象研究所称，特尔斯赫灵岛周五的气温达到33.6摄氏度，创下瓦登群岛有史以来的最高气温纪录。

title: Another round of fierce Rotterdam celebrations after Cape Verde draw with Saudi Arabia
title_zh: 佛得角与沙特阿拉伯战平后，鹿特丹再次爆发激烈的庆祝活动。
description: Cape Verde reached the knockout stage of the World Cup for the first time after a 0-0 draw against Saudi Arabia.
description_zh: 佛得角队在与沙特阿拉伯队的比赛中以0-0战平，首次晋级世界杯淘汰赛阶段。

title: Teen suspected as a contract killer held for murdering Dutch man, 25, in Spain
title_zh: 一名青少年被怀疑是职业杀手，因在西班牙谋杀一名25岁的荷兰男子而被捕。
description: Authorities in Belgium arrested 19-year-old Shah C. on suspicion of murdering Dutch man Jasin Ajar in Spain about 18 months ago in a likely case of mistaken identity.
description_zh: 比利时当局逮捕了 19 岁的 Shah C.，他涉嫌在大约 18 个月前于西班牙谋杀荷兰男子 Jasin Ajar，这很可能是一起认错人的案件。

title: Schools need to pay more attention to grief and loss, experts say
title_zh: 专家表示，学校需要更加重视悲伤和失落。
description: Schools need to add grief and loss to their teaching plans and not only broach the topic after a death occurs, psychologists, educationalists, grief researchers, and other experts told
description_zh: 心理学家、教育家、悲伤研究者和其他专家表示，学校需要将悲伤和失落纳入教学计划，而不仅仅是在死亡发生后才提及这个话题。

title: Oranje supporters' bus begins 1,800km journey to Mexico for Morocco match
title_zh: 橙衣军团球迷的大巴启程前往墨西哥，行程1800公里，观看他们与摩洛哥的比赛。
description: The lead supporters’ bus used in the Netherlands’ “fan walk” has departed the United States for Mexico ahead of the next World Cup match.
description_zh: 荷兰队球迷“游行”活动中使用的领头巴士已从美国出发前往墨西哥，准备迎接下一场世界杯比赛。

title: Harbour Club Amsterdam-Oost files for bankruptcy three years after explosion
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹东港俱乐部在爆炸三年后申请破产
description: The Harbour Club Amsterdam-Oost went bankrupt three years after anexplosiondamaged its venue
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹东港俱乐部在一次爆炸损坏其场地三年后破产

title: Rotterdam unveils €5.1bn coalition plan focused on housing, mobility and growth
title_zh: 鹿特丹公布一项价值51亿欧元的联合政府计划，重点关注住房、交通和增长。
description: Under the coalition agreement ‘Vaart maken’, five parties, PRO, D66, VVD, CDA and Volt, have set out their plans for governing Rotterdam over the next four years.
description_zh: 根据“Vaart maken”联合执政协议，PRO、D66、VVD、CDA 和 Volt 五个政党制定了未来四年治理鹿特丹的计划。

title: Dutch June temperature record broken as 38.2°C recorded in Eindhoven
title_zh: 荷兰六月气温纪录被打破，埃因霍温录得38.2摄氏度。
description: The Netherlands recorded its highest June temperature on record on Friday afternoon, with 38.2 degrees Celsius measured in Eindhoven at 2:40 p.m., according to Weeronline.
description_zh: 据 Weeronline 报道，荷兰周五下午录得 6 月份最高气温，下午 2 点 40 分在埃因霍温测得 38.2 摄氏度。

title: Cabinet sets out €250 million package to reduce nitrogen emissions by 50% by 2035
title_zh: 内阁制定了一项2.5亿欧元的计划，旨在到2035年将氮排放量减少50%。
description: Under the government’s nitrogen strategy, emissions from industry and transport are expected to be cut by 50 percent by 2035 compared with 2019 levels.
description_zh: 根据政府的氮战略，到 2035 年，工业和交通运输的排放量预计将比 2019 年的水平减少 50%。

title: Dutch cabinet agrees plan to slash nitrogen pollution levels
title_zh: 荷兰内阁同意削减氮污染水平的计划
description: The Dutch cabinet has finalised agreement on a new package of measures to reduce nitrogen-based pollution in the Netherlands with...
description_zh: 荷兰内阁已就一揽子减少荷兰氮污染的新措施达成最终协议……

title: Dutch rescue team heading to Venezuela with 65 people, 8 dogs
title_zh: 一支荷兰救援队携65人和8只狗前往委内瑞拉。
description: The Netherlands' Urban Search and Rescue (USAR) team left for Venezuela on Friday to assist in the aftermath of two devastating earthquakes.
description_zh: 荷兰城市搜救队（USAR）于周五启程前往委内瑞拉，协助应对两次毁灭性地震后的灾后重建工作。

title: Severe Code Red heat warning extended through Saturday in several Dutch provinces
title_zh: 荷兰多个省份的严重高温红色预警将延长至周六。
description: The threat of extreme heat continuing into the weekend prompted meteorologists to extend the most severe Code Red weather alert into a second consecutive day in parts of the Netherlands.
description_zh: 由于极端高温天气可能持续到周末，气象学家将荷兰部分地区的最高级别红色天气警报延长至第二天。

title: No air conditioning in vans as Albert Heijn, Picnic delivery staff face extreme heat
title_zh: 由于货车没有空调，Albert Heijn 和 Picnic 的送货人员面临酷暑。
description: Many Albert Heijn delivery drivers are driving around without air conditioning in their vehicles.
description_zh: 许多 Albert Heijn 的送货司机驾驶的车辆都没有空调。

title: Code red extended into Saturday as temperature tops 37°
title_zh: 红色预警持续到周六，气温超过37度
description: The KNMI weather bureau has extended its code red weather warning for the provinces of Limburg, Brabant, Gelderland and Overijssel...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）已将林堡省、布拉班特省、海尔德兰省和上艾瑟尔省的红色天气预警范围扩大……

title: Podcast: The Red Alert, Orange Fever and Blue Wave Edition
title_zh: 播客：红色警报、橙色狂热和蓝色浪潮版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and fund more dreadful theatrical adventures? Click here to become a Patreon backer Children’s...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，资助更多精彩刺激的戏剧冒险吗？点击此处成为 Patreon 支持者。儿童……

title: Walibi and Drievliet close theme parks Friday over heat; Efteling open to staff’s dismay
title_zh: 瓦利比和德里夫利特主题公园因高温于周五关闭；埃夫特林主题公园照常开放，令员工失望不已。
description: Walibi Holland and Drievliet have decided to keep their theme parks closed on Friday due to the expected heat and the
description_zh: 由于预计周五天气炎热，瓦利比荷兰和德里弗利特主题公园决定关闭。

title: More motorists falling victim to dodgy roadside assistance providers
title_zh: 越来越多的驾车者成为不正规道路救援服务提供商的受害者
description: Motorists stranded on the side of the road with a breakdown are increasingly falling victim to dodgy roadside assistance providers, the Association of Recovery and Mobility Specialists (V
description_zh: 据道路救援和出行专家协会（Association of Recovery and Mobility Specialists，简称V）称，因车辆故障滞留在路边的驾驶员越来越容易成为不正规道路救援服务提供商的受害者。

title: Heatwave breaks June 26 record as museums open cooling spaces
title_zh: 热浪打破6月26日的纪录，博物馆开放避暑场所
description: Friday has becomethe hottest June 26on record in the Netherlands.
description_zh: 周五成为荷兰有记录以来最热的6月26日。

title: Is having a dog a way of building local communities?
title_zh: 养狗是构建当地社区的一种方式吗？
description: Dutch residential neighbourhoods are getting pricier, more international and more family-oriented — and on balance, residents welcome the changes, according...
description_zh: 荷兰的住宅区房价越来越高，国际化程度越来越高，也越来越注重家庭居住——总的来说，居民们欢迎这些变化……

title: It is too hot to do anything except complain about the heat
title_zh: 天气太热了，除了抱怨热什么都做不了。
description: Our regular columnist Molly Quell had no inspiration for commentary on Dutch culture this month so she’s chosen to do...
description_zh: 我们的专栏作家莫莉·奎尔本月对荷兰文化没有什么评论灵感，所以她决定……

title: Private firms are fining Dutch festival goers caught with drugs
title_zh: 私人公司对在荷兰音乐节上被发现携带毒品的游客处以罚款。
description: Festival organisers are turning to private security firms to check visitors for drugs and issue fines as local councils impose...
description_zh: 由于地方议会加大了监管力度，音乐节主办方开始聘请私人保安公司检查游客是否携带毒品并处以罚款……

title: Oranje fans delighted by Tunisia win; Thousands of Kansas locals join Dutch fan walk
title_zh: 荷兰队战胜突尼斯队，橙衣军团球迷欣喜若狂；数千名堪萨斯州当地居民加入荷兰球迷游行队伍。
description: Oranje fans are delighted by the Dutch national team's 1-3 victory over Tunisia and qualification for the World Cup knockout phase.
description_zh: 荷兰国家队以 3-1 战胜突尼斯，晋级世界杯淘汰赛阶段，橙衣军团的球迷们欣喜若狂。

title: Dutch spending on restaurants, hotels, and travel expected to fall in 2026 as costs rise
title_zh: 由于成本上升，预计到2026年荷兰人在餐饮、酒店和旅游方面的支出将下降。
description: The Dutch leisure sector is headed for weaker demand in 2026 as costs rise sharply and consumers become more cautious, ABN ARMO
description_zh: 荷兰银行（ABN ARMO）预测，由于成本大幅上涨和消费者变得更加谨慎，荷兰休闲行业在2026年将面临需求疲软的局面。

title: “Unmistakably” climate change: Current heat virtually impossible 50 years ago
title_zh: 气候变化“毋庸置疑”：目前的高温在50年前几乎不可能发生。
description: The current heatwave in Europe is “unmistakably” caused by climate change, research collective World Weather Attribution (WWA) concluded in an analysis in which researchers from the KNMI
description_zh: 世界天气归因研究组织（WWA）在一项分析中得出结论，欧洲当前的热浪“毫无疑问”是由气候变化造成的。该分析由荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）的研究人员共同完成。

title: Code Red heat alarm for temps up to 40°C: Many schools closed; Stay off the roads
title_zh: 红色高温警报，气温高达40摄氏度：多所学校停课；请勿上路。
description: Temperatures can reach up to 40 degrees Celsius in the Netherlands today, and the KNMI has the f
description_zh: 今天荷兰气温最高可达40摄氏度，荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）已发布相关报告。

title: Three dead in separate drownings, including teen boy & amateur footballer
title_zh: 三人溺水身亡，其中包括一名十几岁的男孩和一名业余足球运动员。
description: Many people sought to cool down in the water during yesterday’s hot and sun-drenched weather. In three places in the Netherlands, the water sports ended in tragedy.
description_zh: 昨天天气炎热，阳光炙烤，许多人纷纷下水消暑。在荷兰的三个地方，水上运动却以悲剧告终。

title: Defqon.1 festival canceled as Netherlands issues code red alarm for extreme heat
title_zh: 荷兰发布极端高温红色警报，Defqon.1音乐节取消
description: The Defqon.1 festival in Biddinghuizen has been canceled due to the extreme heat the Netherlands is experiencing.
description_zh: 由于荷兰遭遇极端高温天气，原定在比丁赫伊曾举行的 Defqon.1 音乐节已被取消。

title: Three ICC judges sue Trump adminsitration over "draconian" sanctions
title_zh: 三名国际刑事法院法官就“严苛”制裁起诉特朗普政府
description: Three judges of the International Criminal Court (ICC) in The Hague have sued the United States administration of Donald Trump.
description_zh: 海牙国际刑事法院 (ICC) 的三名法官已对唐纳德·特朗普领导的美国政府提起诉讼。

title: FvD gets round rules to establish its own school in Almere
title_zh: FvD绕过规则，在阿尔梅勒建立自己的学校
description: A school set up by the far right political party Forum voor Democratie has been able to get government funding...
description_zh: 由极右翼政党“民主论坛”（Forum voor Democratie）创办的一所学校获得了政府资助……

title: Dutch charitable donations are shrinking despite higher wages
title_zh: 尽管工资上涨，荷兰的慈善捐款却在减少。
description: Disposable incomes in the Netherlands may be rising but the Dutch themselves are donating less money to charity, according to...
description_zh: 尽管荷兰人的可支配收入可能在增长，但据报道，荷兰人自身捐赠给慈善机构的金额却在减少……

title: An orange bus dinghy leads march in Bristol for women’s cricket
title_zh: 一辆橙色巴士小艇引领布里斯托尔女子板球队的游行队伍
description: It was no Kansas City nor was it Hamburg, but Bristol turned orange on Thursday evening for the first-ever fan...
description_zh: 虽然不是堪萨斯城，也不是汉堡，但周四晚上，布里斯托尔全城都变成了橙色，因为这是有史以来第一次有球迷到场……

title: Heat peaks on Friday, swimmers warned as three drown in one day
title_zh: 周五气温最高，游泳者需警惕，一天内已有三人溺水身亡
description: With temperatures expected to reach a stifling 39 degrees in parts of the Netherlands on Friday, the KNMI weather service...
description_zh: 预计周五荷兰部分地区的气温将达到令人窒息的39摄氏度，荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）气象部门……

title: Oranje through to World Cup knock out with 3-1 win over Tunisia
title_zh: 橙衣军团以3比1战胜突尼斯，晋级世界杯淘汰赛。
description: The Netherlands secured their place in the knockout stage of the World Cup on Thursday with a 3-1 victory over...
description_zh: 荷兰队周四以3比1战胜对手，锁定世界杯淘汰赛席位……

title: Netherlands beats Tunisia to top group, advancing to World Cup knockout against Morocco
title_zh: 荷兰击败突尼斯，位列小组第一，晋级世界杯淘汰赛，将与摩洛哥争夺冠军。
description: The Dutch national team made it two wins out of three in the FIFA World Cup thus far in the early hours on Friday with a 3-1 win over Tunisia in Kansas City, U.S..
description_zh: 周五凌晨，荷兰国家队在美国堪萨斯城以 3-1 战胜突尼斯队，在国际足联世界杯上取得了三场比赛中的第二场胜利。

title: Major insurer urges green shift as paving dominates 50% of Dutch residential gardens
title_zh: 荷兰大型保险公司呼吁转向绿色环保，因为荷兰50%的住宅花园铺设了硬质路面。
description: A study by Centraal Beheer shows that Dutch residential gardens are, on average, almost 50% paved, while nearly 20% are more than 75% covered in hard surfaces.
description_zh: 荷兰中央管理机构的一项研究表明，荷兰住宅花园平均有近 50% 的面积被铺上硬质地面，而近 20% 的花园超过 75% 的面积被硬质地面覆盖。

title: Curaçao's historic World Cup campaign ends in group stage after Ivory Coast defeat
title_zh: 库拉索队历史性的世界杯征程在小组赛阶段结束，他们在对阵科特迪瓦队的比赛中失利。
description: Curacao were knocked out of the FIFA World Cup on Sunday after a defeat to the Ivory Coast. Dick Advocaat’s side ended the group stage with one point, finishing bottom of Group E.
description_zh: 库拉索队周日在世界杯小组赛中负于科特迪瓦队，惨遭淘汰。迪克·艾德沃卡特率领的这支球队最终积1分，位列E组垫底。

title: Even one alcoholic beverage increases chance of cancer, addiction, brain damage: Study
title_zh: 研究表明，即使只喝一杯酒也会增加患癌、成瘾和脑损伤的风险：
description: The Health Council is advising the government to actively discourage alcohol use and reduce its social acceptability.
description_zh: 卫生委员会建议政府积极劝阻饮酒，降低其社会接受度。

title: Rare book dealers fear tech firms are destroying obscure editions to train AI models
title_zh: 珍本书商担心科技公司为了训练人工智能模型而销毁冷门版本。
description: Secondhand booksellers across Europe, including in the Netherlands, are raising concerns over AI companies buying large numbers of obscure and often rare books.
description_zh: 包括荷兰在内的欧洲各地的二手书商对人工智能公司大量购买冷门且往往稀有的书籍表示担忧。

title: Curacao gives officials, lecturers time off to watch World Cup match
title_zh: 库拉索岛允许官员和讲师休假观看世界杯比赛
description: The government of Curaçao has granted civil servants and teachers the afternoon off on Thursday so they can watch the island's World Cup match against Ivory Coast.
description_zh: 库拉索政府已批准公务员和教师周四下午放假，以便他们观看该岛与科特迪瓦的世界杯比赛。

title: ProRail steps up inspections as heatwave triggers multiple infrastructure problems
title_zh: 热浪引发多项基础设施问题，ProRail加强检查力度
description: ProRail is increasing its monitoring of the railway network during the heatwave. Alongside routine maintenance, additional so-called heat inspections are being carried out, a spokesperson said.
description_zh: ProRail发言人表示，在热浪期间，铁路网络的监控力度正在加大。除了日常维护外，他们还在进行额外的所谓“高温检查”。

title: First-ever Code Red alert issued for heat in the Netherlands; Up to 40°C tomorrow
title_zh: 荷兰首次发布高温红色预警；明日气温将高达40摄氏度
description: The most severe weather alert for excessive heat was issued in the Netherlands for the first time in history on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，荷兰历史上首次发布了最严重的高温天气警报。

title: Many parents letting their kids stay up late to watch Oranje vs Tunisia World Cup match
title_zh: 许多家长让孩子熬夜观看荷兰队对阵突尼斯队的世界杯比赛。
description: The Netherlands is playing against Tunisia in the FIFA World Cup at 1:00 a.m. on Friday, Dutch time - way past bedtime for almost all children.
description_zh: 荷兰队将于周五凌晨 1 点（荷兰时间）在 FIFA 世界杯上对阵突尼斯队——这对于几乎所有孩子来说都远远超过了睡觉时间。

title: KNMI weather service issues first ever code red for extreme heat
title_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）气象部门首次发布极端高温红色警报
description: The KNMI weather service has issued a code red warning for extreme heat for the first time, as the Netherlands...
description_zh: 荷兰皇家气象研究所（KNMI）首次发布了极端高温红色预警，荷兰……

title: Oranje ready to take on Tunisia as storm clouds gather in Kansas
title_zh: 橙衣军团准备迎战突尼斯，堪萨斯州乌云密布。
description: The Netherlands take on Tunisia in their final World Cup group match in the early hours of Friday morning, but...
description_zh: 荷兰队将于周五凌晨迎战突尼斯队，进行世界杯小组赛的最后一场比赛，但是……

title: Woman found unconscious, badly injured near Amsterdam-Oost rail station
title_zh: 一名女子在阿姆斯特丹东站附近被发现昏迷不醒，身受重伤。
description: A 28-year-old woman was found injured and unconscious on Insulindeweg in Amsterdam-Oost on Tuesday evening.
description_zh: 周二晚上，一名 28 岁女子在阿姆斯特丹东区的 Insulindeweg 街被发现受伤昏迷。

title: Dutch heatwave now official; Historic Code Red hot weather alert debated
title_zh: 荷兰热浪正式发布；历史性的红色高温天气警报引发热议。
description: The official declaration of a heatwave took place on Thursday in the Netherlands, with daytime temperatures below 30 unlikely until next week.
description_zh: 荷兰于周四正式宣布进入热浪状态，预计下周之前白天气温不太可能低于 30 度。

title: Dutch rescue team deployed to Venezuela following major earthquake disaster
title_zh: 荷兰救援队在委内瑞拉发生重大地震灾害后被派往该国。
description: The Netherlands is sending a search-and-rescue team to Venezuela to assist in the aftermath of a series of earthquakes, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs said.
description_zh: 荷兰外交部表示，荷兰将派遣一支搜救队前往委内瑞拉，协助应对一系列地震后的灾后重建工作。

title: Forget one glass a day: no alcohol is safe, Dutch advisers warn
title_zh: 荷兰顾问警告：别再只喝一杯酒了，任何酒精饮料都不安全。
description: There is no safe level of alcohol consumption and even a single glass a day carries risk, the Dutch Health...
description_zh: 荷兰卫生部门表示，饮酒没有安全剂量，即使每天只喝一杯也存在风险……

title: No complaint? Then no compensation for too-high asset tax bill
title_zh: 没有投诉？那就无需对过高的资产税单进行补偿。
description: Taxpayers who did not make a formal complaint about the size of their Box 3 asset tax bill in time...
description_zh: 未及时就第三类资产税账单金额提出正式投诉的纳税人……

title: Dutch AI firm General Intuition raises $320 million in new round
title_zh: 荷兰人工智能公司 General Intuition 在新一轮融资中筹集了 3.2 亿美元。
description: Dutch AI company General Intuition has raised $320 million (€282 million) in a new investment round, bringing its total funding...
description_zh: 荷兰人工智能公司 General Intuition 在新一轮融资中筹集了 3.2 亿美元（2.82 亿欧元），使其总融资额达到……

title: Netherlands considering deportation centers in Kenya, Rwanda for failed asylum seekers
title_zh: 荷兰考虑在肯尼亚和卢旺达设立遣返中心，用于安置被拒的寻求庇护者。
description: The Dutch government is primarily considering Kenya as a partner country to open a deportation center for asylum seekers whose applications were rejected in the Netherlands, sources close
description_zh: 据知情人士透露，荷兰政府正优先考虑与肯尼亚合作，开设一个遣返中心，用于接收在荷兰申请庇护被拒的寻求庇护者。

title: Report: Rising construction theft delays projects, drives up costs
title_zh: 报告：建筑盗窃案增多导致工期延误，成本上升
description: Theft and vandalism at construction sites are on the rise, according to the 2025Construction Industry Crime R
description_zh: 根据《2025年建筑业犯罪报告》，建筑工地的盗窃和破坏行为正在增加。

title: Dutch Supreme Court: No Box 3 refunds for taxpayers who failed to file timely objections
title_zh: 荷兰最高法院：未及时提出异议的纳税人不得获得第三类税款退款
description: People who failed to file a timely objection to the unlawfulBox 3 tax levywill not receive a refund,
description_zh: 未能及时对非法征收的第3项税款提出异议的人将无法获得退款。

title: Koeman rules out rotation as Oranje target top spot amid storm threat
title_zh: 科曼排除轮换的可能性，橙衣军团在风暴威胁下力争榜首位置。
description: Ronald Koeman says the Netherlands will be fully focused on securing first place in their World Cup group when they play their final group-stage match at 1 a.m.
description_zh: 罗纳德·科曼表示，荷兰队将在凌晨1点进行小组赛最后一场比赛，全力以赴确保小组第一。

title: More day releases to help prisons bursting at the seams: NOS
title_zh: 增加日间释放措施以缓解监狱人满为患的状况：NOS
description: Overcrowding and lack of staff could prompt prisons to put more prisoners on day release, according to justice ministry plans...
description_zh: 根据司法部的计划，监狱人满为患和人手不足可能会促使监狱安排更多囚犯进行日间释放……

title: Dutch ministers visit Syria to discuss refugee returns
title_zh: 荷兰部长访问叙利亚，讨论难民返回问题
description: Foreign affairs minister Tom Berendsen and asylum minister Bart van den Brink have travelled to Damascus to meet Syrian president...
description_zh: 外交部长汤姆·贝伦森和庇护部长巴特·范登布林克已前往大马士革会见叙利亚总统……

title: Another hot and sunny day ahead with 37°C maximum; Temperatures peaking tomorrow
title_zh: 又是一个炎热晴朗的日子，最高气温将达到37摄氏度；明天气温将达到峰值。
description: Thursday will be another tropically hot day in the inland Netherlands, with highs up to 37 degrees Celsius.
description_zh: 周四荷兰内陆地区将再次迎来炎热的天气，最高气温将达到 37 摄氏度。

title: 17-year-old boy arrested for groping 9 women in Dordrecht region
title_zh: 一名17岁男孩因在多德雷赫特地区猥亵9名女性而被捕
description: The police arrested a 17-year-old boy from Hendrik-Ido-Ambacht for sexually assaulting multiple women cycling in his hometown and the nearby Zwijndrecht in recent weeks.
description_zh: 警方逮捕了一名来自亨德里克-伊多-安巴赫特的 17 岁男孩，他涉嫌在最近几周在其家乡和附近的兹温德雷赫特性侵多名骑自行车的女性。

title: Venezuela earthquakes leave at least 32 dead, 700 hurt: Dutch search team on standby
title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震已造成至少32人死亡，700人受伤：荷兰搜救队已做好准备
description: Two powerful earthquakes with magnitudes of 7.2 and 7.5 hit northern Venezuela in quick succession around 6:00 p.m. on Wednesday, local time.
description_zh: 当地时间周三下午 6 点左右，委内瑞拉北部接连发生两次强烈地震，震级分别为 7.2 级和 7.5 级。

title: Suspect arrested in severe beating of two Utrecht women
title_zh: 一名嫌犯因严重殴打两名乌得勒支女性而被捕
description: Thepolicearrested a man in Venlo, suspected of
description_zh: 警方在芬洛逮捕了一名男子，该男子涉嫌……

title: Defqon.1 festival cancels day tickets for Friday and Saturday due to extreme heat
title_zh: 由于极端高温天气，Defqon.1音乐节取消了周五和周六的单日门票。
description: Bad news for day ticket holders for the Defqon.1 festival for Friday and Saturday.
description_zh: 对于持有周五和周六 Defqon.1 音乐节单日票的观众来说，这是个坏消息。
